texto: RACHEL MADDUX | ON STAYING HUNGRY Hunger is everything because it’s nothing - not yet - just raw promise, one lack that may eclipse others: talent, pedigree, luck. Like sharks, the hungry must always keep moving, hunting, killing, “killing it.” - Scratch: Writers, Money, and the Art of Making a Living
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Rachael Maddux: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a vida. O trecho “RACHEL MADDUX | ON STAYING HUNGRY Hunger is everything because it’s nothing - not yet - just raw …” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que vida, scratch, writing-life pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de writing-life.
